_readme.how_to_add: Copy one of the example entries below, paste it at the end of the 'schools' array, and fill in your school's real details. Remove the comments. Run node scripts/generate.js to rebuild.

field_definitions.name: Full legal name of the school (string, required)
field_definitions.curriculum_usage: Either 'partial', 'majority', or 'full' (string, required)  —  partial = some modules used, majority = most of the curriculum used, full = entire K-12 programme adopted
field_definitions.description: One to two sentences describing the school and how it uses Altair (string, required)
field_definitions.website: Full URL including https:// (string, optional — remove the field entirely if not applicable)
field_definitions.featured: Set to true to pin this school to the Featured section at the top of the page (boolean, optional, default false — requires approval)
field_definitions.badge: Either 'certified' or 'advanced', or null for no badge (string, optional — only set this after an official review is complete)

_readme.badge_request: To request a Featured listing or a badge upgrade, open an issue at github.com/altair-curriculum/registry with the title 'Badge Request: [School Name]' and attach evidence of curriculum adoption (e.g. timetable screenshots, teacher statement).
_readme.removing_a_school: Delete the entire object for that school from the 'schools' array and rebuild. The entry will no longer appear on the page.
_readme.example_entry: See the placeholder entries below. Replace every value that says REPLACE_THIS with your real data.

schools._comment: EXAMPLE 1 — Featured school with Advanced badge. Replace all REPLACE_THIS values.
schools.name: REPLACE_THIS — e.g. Greenfield Primary School
schools.description: REPLACE_THIS — Write one or two sentences about this school and how it uses the Altair curriculum.

schools._comment: EXAMPLE 2 — Standard school with Certified badge. Replace all REPLACE_THIS values.
schools.name: REPLACE_THIS — e.g. St. Catherine's Academy
schools.description: REPLACE_THIS — Write one or two sentences about this school and how it uses the Altair curriculum.

schools._comment: EXAMPLE 3 — Basic school entry with no badge. Replace all REPLACE_THIS values.
schools.name: REPLACE_THIS — e.g. Riverside Community School
schools.description: REPLACE_THIS — Write one or two sentences about this school and how it uses the Altair curriculum.
